name: M365 Accounts Disabled on Termination
description: Ensures Entra ID accounts are disabled when employees are terminated
query: SELECT u.id, u.user_principal_name, u.display_name, e.termination_date FROM entra_users u JOIN employees e ON u.mail = e.work_email WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND u.account_enabled = true
remediation: Disable M365/Entra ID accounts for terminated users within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows.
